headline: JPMorgan CEO cuts to the chase on stock market danger
summary: JPMorgan Chase just had the most profitable quarter in its history. Second-quarter net income came in at $21.2 billion, powered by a surge in trading revenue and a gain on its Visa stake. The S&P 500 is up close to 10% this year. Consumers are still spending. Inflation has moderated. By most ...

headline: Should You Invest in Visa (V) Based on Bullish Wall Street Views?
summary: The average brokerage recommendation (ABR) for Visa (V) is equivalent to a Buy. The overly optimistic recommendations of Wall Street analysts make the effectiveness of this highly sought-after metric questionable. So, is it worth buying the stock?

headline: Northern Trust shares edge higher after strong second-quarter results driven by Visa gain (NASDAQ:NTRS)
summary: Earnings and revenue surpass Wall Street expectationsNorthern Trust Corporation (NASDAQ:NTRS) reported second-quarter 2026 results that comfortably exceeded analyst forecasts, supported by higher fee income and a significant gain related to its participation in Visa’s exchange offer. The company posted adjusted earnings per share of $4.

headline: New Visa Data Reveals How the FIFA World Cup 2026™ Created Pop-Up Economies Across Canada, Mexico and the United States
summary: SAN FRANCISCO, July 22, 2026--After the final whistle blew on the FIFA World Cup 2026™, millions of fans returned home with unforgettable memories and a trail of economic activity that stretched across countries. Every tap to pay left a lasting impact, as spending throughout the tournament delivered a meaningful boost to merchants and local economies across host cities in Canada, Mexico and the United States.

headline: NOVI Health Named Wellness Partner for Visa Infinite's Reimagined Premium Ecosystem Across Asia Pacific
summary: NOVI Health, the Singapore-based longevity and metabolic health company, has been named a wellness partner for Visa's reimagined Visa Infinite proposition across Asia Pacific, placing preventative healthcare for the first time alongside travel, dining and lifestyle as a defining pillar of the region's most exclusive card ecosystem.

headline: Visa (V) Could Be 17% Undervalued On Stablecoin And AI Push
summary: Visa (V) just rolled out two major products, the Visa Stablecoin Platform and an AI Financial Assistant for banks, giving investors fresh information on how the stock is tied to stablecoins and AI-driven financial tools. See our latest analysis for Visa. Visa’s share price has gained momentum recently, with an 8.73% 1 month share price return and a 14.31% 3 month share price return. The 3 year total shareholder return of 52.51% points to stronger longer term compounding despite more muted...

headline: UOB partners Visa to launch new Visa Infinite tiers across ASEAN in landmark multi-market launch of such scale
summary: UOB has partnered with Visa, a global leader in digital payments, to relaunch several card products across its five key markets (Singapore, Malaysia, Thailand, Indonesia and Vietnam) under Visa's newly introduced premium card tiers, Visa Infinite Privilege and Visa Infinite Private.
